offline_safe_policy: Trust tiers classify provenance and review priority. They do not certify live URL health unless live check scripts were run in networked mode.

publisher-official.description: Publisher-wide official source such as author center, policy, template, publishing agreement, copyright/license, open access, AI, data/code, or permissions page.

journal-official.description: Target-journal homepage, Guide for Authors / Information for Authors, scope page, journal page, or submission instructions.

society-official.description: Society or owner page associated with a journal.

repository-best-practice.description: Unofficial skill-suite routing, output contract, context-safety, and reviewer-risk guidance.

template-paper-observation.description: Structural observation from lawful paper-template corpus. Never copy text/figures/tables/captions.

unverified-candidate.description: Candidate or incomplete source that requires human review before use for real submission advice.
